chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1620 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For order on MA No.7794/2021. For order on MA No.7795/2021. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present for intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2021 and lastly it was fixed in Court on 20.10.2021 wherein counsel for the petitioner was required to produce the petitioner and matter was adjourned. Since then it is pending without any progress and even the petitioner has not attempt to fix the same in Court for further proceedings. This shows lack of interest on the part of the petitioner. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
